extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR countered LE FAY's late attack on final 11% ramps to Folignano, gapped field by 2 seconds, reversed 9-second GC deficit to EVENEPOEL.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE attempted early move to isolate POGAČAR for EVENEPOEL's long-range attack, but POGAČAR marked directly negating tactic.
POGAČAR waited for LE FAY's wheel rather than initiating, using counterattack momentum to create decisive gap on 11% ramps.
Multiple UAE/QuickStep reconnaissance attacks on penultimate lap failed because POGAČAR personally marked every EVENEPOEL acceleration.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: long-range attacks repeatedly marked by POGAČAR personally; lost 11 seconds on final climb after failing pre-planned distance move
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: executed domestique role attempting isolation tactics for EVENEPOEL, showing team leadership transfer complete
rider_signals.LE FAY Victor: positive: late attack strong enough to draw POGAČAR's wheel, finishing third showing climbing form resurging
rider_signals.SIMMONS Quinn: positive: aggressively hunted KOM points from breakaway despite teammate DE BAIE holding jersey, prioritizing personal ambition over team
rider_signals.BINGOL Omer: positive: fourth place on selective 11% finish unexpected for rider recovering from time trial disappointment
